conservative.name: Mollison's Cocktail
conservative.requirements: Must have a bottle or jug of spirits or dwarfbeer, a source of fire, and a target within close range

success.description: Improvising a wick from a scrap of fabric or even your own beard, you create an extremely dangerous firebomb, which you hurl at your target for 8 damage

boon.description: All enemies engaged with the target suffers 1 stress

reckless.name: Mollison's Cocktail
reckless.requirements: Must have a bottle or jug of spirits or dwarfbeer, a source of fire, and a target within close range

success.description: Improvising a wick from a scrap of fabric or even your own beard, you create an extremely dangerous firebomb, which you hurl at your target for Intelligence + 4 damage

boon.description: All characters engaged with the target suffer 1 wound
All characters engaged with the target suffer 1 wound

chaosStar.description: Catastrophe! You light part of your hair, beard, or clothing on fire. You suffer 1 wound and must spend your next action beating it out or suffer another wound
